title: Moroccan Ham Fajitas
description: A flavorful and spicy dish combining the flavors of Morocco with the comfort of a fajita. This recipe is quick, easy, and perfect for a weeknight dinner.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of garlicky stir-fry oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced serrano peppers to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the diced ham to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, until lightly browned.
Add the stir-fry mix to the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes, until the vegetables are tender.
Serve the ham and vegetable mixture hot, garnished with fresh cilantro leaves.
Warm flour or corn tortillas and serve with the fajita mixture.
Optional: serve with your favorite toppings, such as salsa, sour cream, or shredded cheese.
